questions.question_text: Do Any Four CO Mapping a Differentiate between conventional and non-conventional energy resources. 5 b Outline the challenges and remedies associated with the use of solar energy. 5 c What is the impact of wind energy generation on environment? 5 d What is biomass direct combustion? Explain in detail. 5 e Distinguish between wave and tidal energy. 5 f How do you classify hydrogen production methods? Explain any One of them. 5
What are the types of solar radiation measuring Instruments? Explain the working of Sunshine recorder with a neat sketch. 10
Explain the process of generation of power in solar pond with a neat sketch and mention its merits and demerits. 10

Illustrate the power generation process in horizontal axis wind turbine with its merits and demerits. 10
